input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.4
            TITLE: driving offsite - prohibited

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.4: Driving Offsite - Prohibited
D.3.4 Driving Offsite - Prohibited 
Teams found to have driven their vehicle at an offsite location during the period of the 
competition will be excluded from the competition.

final_answer: rule D.3.4: Driving Offsite - Prohibited D.3.4 Driving Offsite - Prohibited Teams found to have driven their vehicle at an offsite location during the period of the competition will be excluded from the competition.
